title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Allow the Operation of Tricycles in the Municipality of Los Baños Through a Modified Odd-even Scheme During the Implementation of Enhanced Community Quarantine, Subject to the Approval of the Department of the Interior and Local Government DILG. (AUTHOR (S): Councilor (s) Josephine S. Evangelista, Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Arlene P. De
